name: Microcontroller
shortDescription: A microcontroller (MCU) is a self-contained computer on a chip with Central Processing Unit (CPU), memory, and peripherals for embedded control.
whatIsIt: A microcontroller (MCU) is a self-contained computer on a chip with CPU, memory, and peripherals for embedded control.
whyExists: MCUs provide programmable, low-cost control for countless electronic devices.
whereUsed: Used in appliances, cars, Internet of Things (IoT), and virtually every smart device.
